nodes.label: Obsidian Graph View UI — Light Theme Screenshot
nodes.rationale: Shows Obsidian October 2021 event page alongside the Graph View panel in light mode. Left sidebar shows file tree (Obsidian Hub), center panel shows an interactive force-directed knowledge graph with node clusters and color-coded groups, right panel shows the October 2021 event article. Demonstrates Obsidian's core graph visualization feature and community engagement via official events.

nodes.label: Obsidian Graph View
nodes.rationale: Force-directed interactive graph visualization panel built into Obsidian. Supports grouping nodes by color, filtering, and showing forces between linked notes. Core UX feature visible in both light and dark screenshots.
